7:I[702,["717","static/chunks/717-762631ee52187b2c.js","373","static/chunks/373-b950873564dcce24.js","152","static/chunks/152-50983241733f49bd.js","569","static/chunks/569-aab113d61a1fbed9.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-a0fa217f07b71b8d.js"],"QuickJump"]
2:Td52,┌─────────┐         TLS:29509          ┌─────────┐         TLS:29503          ┌─────────┐
│   AMF   │  ═══════════════════════════►│  AUSF   │                              │   UDM   │
│ (Client)│  ◄═══════════════════════════│ (Server)│                              │ (Server)│
│172.16.  │                              │172.16.  │                              │172.16.  │
│178.10   │                              │178.10   │                              │178.10   │
└────┬────┘                              └─────────┘                              └────┬────┘
     │                                                                                  │
     │  1. POST /nausf-auth/v1/ue-authentications                                       │
     │     Body: {supiOrSuci, servingNetworkName}                                       │
     │  ═══════════════════════════════════════════►                                     │
     │                                                                                  │
     │  ◄═══════════════════════════════════════════                                    │
     │     200 OK {authResult, kseaf}                                                   │
     │                                                                                  │
     │  2. PUT /nausf-auth/v1/ue-authentications/{suci}/5g-aka-confirmation             │
     │     Body: {resStar}                                                              │
     │  ════════════════════════════════════════════►                                    │
     │                                                                                  │
     │  ◄════════════════════════════════════════════                                   │
     │     200 OK {authResult, supi, kseaf}                                             │
     │                                                                                  │
     │  3. GET /nudm-sdm/v1/imsi-2089300007487/nssai?plmnid=20893                       │
     │  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════►  │
     │                                                                                  │
     │  ◄══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════  │

responses)"}]]}]]}]]}]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-12","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-[var(--muted)] mb-4 border-b border-[var(--card-border)] pb-2","children":"REST API Integration"}],["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xs font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)] mb-2","children":"Create and Run Simulation"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] p-4 mb-4","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"text-xs font-mono text-[var(--muted)] whitespace-pre-wrap","children":"# Create simulation from template\ncurl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n  -d '{\"name\":\"AMF Test\",\"templatePath\":\"/v1/template/100\"}' \\\n  http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation\n\n# Start execution\ncurl -s -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n  -d '{\"state\":\"Running\"}' \\\n  http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation/100\n\n# Get results\ncurl -s http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation/100/resulttotals"}]}],["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xs font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)] mb-2","children":"Python Integration Example"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] p-4 mb-4","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"text-xs font-mono text-[var(--muted)] whitespace-pre-wrap","children":"import requests\nimport time\n\ndef run_amf_auth_test():\n    # Create simulation\n    response = requests.post(\n        'http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation',\n        json={\n            'name': 'Automated AMF Test',\n            'templatePath': '/v1/template/100'\n        }\n    )\n    sim_id = response.json()['id']\n    \n    # Start it\n    requests.put(\n        f'http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation/{sim_id}',\n        json={'state': 'Running'}\n    )\n    \n    # Poll for completion\n    while True:\n        status = requests.get(\n            f'http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation/{sim_id}'\n        ).json()\n        if status['state'] == 'Done':\n            return requests.get(\n                f'http://192.168.122.10:8089/v1/simulation/{sim_id}/resulttotals'\n            ).json()\n        time.sleep(5)"}]}],["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xs font-semibold text-[var(--foreground)] mb-2","children":"CI/CD Integration (GitHub Actions)"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"rounded-lg border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] p-4","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"text-xs font-mono text-[var(--muted)] whitespace-pre-wrap","children":"name: 5G Core Test\non: [push]\njobs:\n  test:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Run PureLoad Simulation\n        run: |\n          RESULT=$(curl -s http://test-env:8089/v1/simulation/100/resulttotals)\n          OK_RATE=$(echo $RESULT | jq '.percentageOK')\n          if [ \"$OK_RATE\" != \"100\" ]; then exit 1; fi"}]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-12","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-[var(--muted)] mb-4 border-b border-[var(--card-border)] pb-2","children":"Scale Testing"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--foreground)] mb-4","children":["Same authentication flow, but with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"5,000 parallel instances"}]," at 100 TPS."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","table",null,{"className":"w-full text-xs border border-[var(--card-border)]","children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"className":"bg-[var(--muted-bg)]","children":[["$","th",null,{"className":"text-left px-3 py-2
